Registry / Terms / inspection body

inspection body

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #03142 · 2 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
202X2022OIML D010:2022
#03143
3.9
body that performs inspection (ISO/IEC 17020, 3.5)
pending
202X2022OIML D037:2022
#03142
3.5
For the purposes of the OIML-CS, an Inspection Body is OIML Issuing Authority approved by the OIML-CS management Committee. The Inspection Body has used compliance with ISO/IEC 17020 and the additional requirements specifies in OIML-CS Procedural Document PD-03 Application and approval of OIML Issuing Authorities, Utilizers and Associates to demonstrate their competence. OIML guidance to subclause 3.5 (G.3.5-1)
pending
G 18 — OIML Term-Usage Registry
